question: The chart shows customer satisfaction levels. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Neutral customers represent about half of Satisfied customers.
options.B: Satisfied has the highest percentage at 42.3%.
options.C: Very Satisfied has the highest satisfaction level among all categories.
options.D: Neutral and Dissatisfied combined represent over 25% of customers.

explanation: Labels show Satisfied at 42.3% (highest), so the correct answer is that Satisfied has the highest percentage at 42.3%. The pie uses visual sizes that don't match; Neutral's slice appears large, making that option misleading.
